productDisplayName: Puma Men White Aquil Sports Shoes
description: Style Notepuma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. These shoes are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and styleProduct DetailsMesh upper with synthetic overlays, has synthetic twill tape lacesFormstripe on the sideComfort insole with mesh tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable FitTextile lining for added comfortLightweight rubber midsoleOutsole reinforced onto the toe to act as a toe guardMade of high traction rubber and has a scooped midfootMultidirectional lugs, suction points and flex grooves on the outsoleMaterial and CareMesh, syntheticRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
